environment.chrome: Google Chrome 150 + Playwright Chromium for extension tests
notes: Model/inference: extension page (MV3 CSP, chrome-extension:// origin)
Cold start: fresh Chrome profile, first load
Storage: chrome.storage.local write → onChanged (same page + background→page)
Accuracy: synthetic landmark sequences only; no labeled webcam video

inference.productionFps: ~30 (camera frame rate; break.js processes one pose frame per new webcam frame)

accuracy.realWorldWebcamAccuracy: Not measured — requires labeled exercise video
accuracy.ninetyFivePercentClaim: Not verified on real webcam data; synthetic FSM tests pass 6/6
